2606.04645.title: CYGNET: Cypher Gate for Neural Execution Triage and Cost Containment
2606.04645.paper_summary: Language models acting as agents over knowledge graphs generate Cypher queries that fail structurally (crashing at the database) or semantically (executing but returning wrong results). We place a pre-execution gate between query generation and a production Neo4j database. The gate validates structure through a four-backend chain culminating in execution against a mirror graph at 5.6 ms median latency. Structurally broken queries are routed to a corrector that iterates structured error feedback through a language model. On seven CypherBench schemas (2348 questions, ACL 2025) the pipeline maintains generation accuracy on every model tested, confirming it operates as a safe defensive layer. The corrector achieves 81% to 95% success across five models (mean 89%). On a template-generated corpus across nine schemas the gate catches 100% of parse errors, 100% of constraint violations, and 100% of schema-reference errors in path queries with labelled endpoints, at zero false positives across 1135 queries. Property sibling-swaps where the substituted name is valid on the target label score 0%, marking the formal boundary where structural validation ends and semantic validation must begin. A planner-based cost gate flags catastrophic plan structures before execution.
2606.04645.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型作為知識圖譜上的代理，生成的 Cypher 查詢在結構上失敗（在數據庫崩潰）或在語義上失敗（執行但返回錯誤結果）。我們在查詢生成和生產 Neo4j 數據庫之間放置了一個執行前閘。該閘通過一個四後端鏈進行結構驗證，最終在 5.6 毫秒的中位延遲下對鏡像圖進行執行。結構錯誤的查詢被路由到一個修正器，該修正器通過語言模型迭代結構錯誤反饋。在七個 CypherBench 架構（2348 個問題，ACL 2025）上，該管道在每個測試的模型上保持生成準確性，確認它作為一個安全的防禦層運作。修正器在五個模型上達到 81% 到 95% 的成功率（平均 89%）。在九個架構的模板生成語料庫中，該閘捕捉到 100% 的解析錯誤、100% 的約束違反和 100% 的模式引用錯誤，對於帶有標籤端點的路徑查詢，1135 個查詢中沒有假陽性。屬性兄弟交換中，替代名稱在目標標籤上有效的情況下得分為 0%，標誌著結構驗證結束和語義驗證開始的正式邊界。在執行之前，基於計劃的成本閘標記災難性的計劃結構。
2606.04645.author: Nikodem Tomczak et.al.
